articles.title: Vodafone supersonic 5G Standalone coverage improvements come to Manchester airport
articles.summary:
A dedicated indoor coverage solution installed across Terminal 2 and Terminal 3 Departures at Manchester Airport has been delivering Vodafone 5G Standalone (5G SA), as well as improving existing 4G and 5G coverage. 
 The post  Vodafone supersonic 5G Standalone coverage improvements come to Manchester airport  appeared first on  Vodafone UK News Centre .
